description: A decentralized payment gateway for Solana that lets merchants accept USDC, SOL, and SPL tokens with instant settlement and sub-cent fees. Built for e-commerce integrations with Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom checkout APIs.
targetAudience: Crypto-native e-commerce merchants and SaaS businesses on Solana who want to accept stablecoin payments without intermediaries. Technical founders who value decentralization, low fees, and programmable payment flows.
